---
title: ""
about: 
  template: solana
  image: files/images/main.jpg
---

I am a third-year Economics PhD student at the <a href="https://cla.umn.edu/about/directory/profile/cohen770" target="_blank" style="color: grey; text-decoration: underline;text-decoration-style: solid;">University of Minnesota</a>, and a Research Analyst at the <a href="https://www.minneapolisfed.org/economic-research/graduate-program" target="_blank" style="color: grey; text-decoration: underline;text-decoration-style: solid;">Federal Reserve Bank of Minneapolis</a>.

My research interests are broadly in Macro-Finance, Monetary Economics, Search and Matching models, and Computational methods.

Previously, I have worked for the Bank of England (where I was a Graduate Research Intern in Summer 2025), as well as the Federal Reserve Board (where I was a Graduate Research Intern in Summer 2024, and before that a Research Assistant).

Here are my [**CV**](files/cv/ethan-cohen-cv.pdf) and my [**research**](research.qmd).

[{{< fa envelope title="Email" >}}](mailto:cohen770@umn.edu) &nbsp;
[{{< fa brands google-scholar title="Google Scholar" >}}](https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=CSXtMcQAAAAJ&view_op=list_works&gmla=AFix5MZeG8Ss-qWI_U87S1taxnW8epjh7DKJbPt9z06Ci812SIkzXNUvbVRgBC0GQD4nzwvcYAoqn_jd9xrEcZ4S){target="_blank"} &nbsp; 
[{{< fa brands linkedin title="Linkedin" >}}](https://www.linkedin.com/in/e-t-cohen){target="_blank"}  &nbsp;
[{{< fa brands github title="Github" >}}](https://github.com/ettcohen){target="_blank"}


### Upcoming Presentations

<a href="" target="_blank" style="color:#6688ff; text-decoration: underline;text-decoration-style: solid;"><i>9th Short-Term Funding Markets Conference</i></a>

<a href="https://virtual.oxfordabstracts.com/event/76093/session/179627" target="_blank" style="color:#6688ff; text-decoration: underline;text-decoration-style: solid;"><i> 2026 Royal Economic Society Annual Conference</i></a>

<a href="" target="_blank" style="color:#6688ff; text-decoration: underline;text-decoration-style: solid;"><i>2026 Summer Workshop on Money, Banking, Payments, and Finance </i></a>
